lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: How old was Josiah when he became king?
answers: Eight years old
Twelve years old
Sixteen years old
Twenty years old

questions.text: How does 2 Chronicles describe Josiah as king?
answers: He did what was right in God’s eyes and followed God like David
He worshiped many false gods like Ahab
He wasn't very smart
He slept on a pile of gold

questions.text: What did Josiah do to clean up the sin in the land?
answers: He destroyed altars, idols, and false god statues
He built more temples
He put the sinners in prision
He built more idol statues

questions.text: What did Josiah order his men to repair?
answers: The temple
His palace
The city wall
The statues of the false gods

questions.text: What did Hilkiah the priest find while the temple was being repaired?
answers: A lost scroll of God’s law
A chest of gold
A hidden idol
A treasure map

questions.text: What did Shaphan do when he brought the scroll to Josiah?
answers: He read it to the king
He ripped it into pieces
He drew a picture on it
He burned it

questions.text: How did Josiah respond when the scroll was read to him?
answers: He was sad and tore his clothes
He laughed and ignored it
He was angry at Shaphan for bothering him
He gave Shaphan a reward

questions.text: What message did the prophet Huldah give to Josiah?
answers: God's sinful people would be punished, but not until after Josiah died
Josiah would be king forever
Josiah would be defeated by his enemies
Josiah should throw away the lost scroll

questions.text: What did Josiah do when he gathered the people together?
answers: He read the scroll of God’s law to them
He yelled at them for sinning
He told them to find a new god to worship
He sent them to look for more lost scrolls

questions.text: What promise did Josiah and the people make?
answers: To obey God’s commands with all their heart
To build a bigger temple
To fight every nation around them
To build a giant statue of the Lord God
